run_count_tiers.note: Probabilistic evals (#1, #2, #3, #4) run at least 5 times to account for LLM and MCP stochasticity. Deterministic structural/validation evals (#5, #8, #10, #11, #12, #13) run at least 3 times. Structural-only assertion evals (#14) run once.
